title: rubus lambertianus var. genuinus
intro: Rubus lambertianus var. genuinus, also known as the Lambert's raspberry, is a variety of the Rubus lambertianus plant, which is a species of thorny shrub native to New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rubus lambertianus var. genuinus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide antioxidant protection. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which are used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations and digestive issues.
